element_introduction_order.mastery_context: collision-based interaction with environment and enemies
player must bump other riders as core mechanic
secondary collection objective alongside power modules
combat encounter; tanks launch heads when destroyed

typical_tension_triggers: introduction of rough terrain in stage 2
Dinosaur Tank appearance and head-launching attacks
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: three-phase cycle repeating infinitely with escalating difficulty; each cycle introduces new hazard type before climactic boss encounter

difficulty_curve.early_game: stage 1 establishes core bumping mechanic in safer environment with mobile obstacles
difficulty_curve.mid_game: stage 2 introduces stationary rough terrain as navigation challenge, removing dynamic rider interaction
difficulty_curve.late_game: stage 3 presents boss combat requiring pattern recognition against Dinosaur Tank attacks
notable_spikes: transition to stage 2 (terrain hazard replaces mobile obstacles)
infinite sequence repetition with progressive difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: each complete cycle consists of: rider-bumping section → rough terrain navigation → dinosaur tank boss battle
notable_level_patterns.example_level: all stages follow identical structure with background/aesthetic changes

notable_level_patterns.description: sequence repeats indefinitely with changing backgrounds and escalating difficulty each cycle
stage introduces one primary hazard type (riders → terrain → bosses) before resetting
